title: Basel III Finalization — Regulatory Reporting System Upgrade
description: You are a Business Analyst on the Basel III Finalization project at JPMorgan Chase. Your manager Sarah Chen (VP) has assigned you to lead the business analysis for a regulatory reporting system upgrade. This is a high-visibility project with the Managing Director watching closely.

sarah_chen.name: Sarah Chen
sarah_chen.title: VP, Business Analysis
sarah_chen.personality: Professional, supportive but demanding. Expects proactive communication.

david_martinez.name: David Martinez
david_martinez.title: Managing Director, Risk Technology
david_martinez.personality: Senior, direct, time-pressed. Values conciseness and ownership.

priya_kapoor.name: Priya Kapoor
priya_kapoor.title: Director, Regulatory Compliance
priya_kapoor.personality: Detail-oriented, cautious. Wants regulatory accuracy above all.

lisa_park.name: Lisa Park
lisa_park.title: Technology PM
lisa_park.personality: Friendly, collaborative, keeps things moving. Good political antennae.

tom_walsh.name: Tom Walsh
tom_walsh.title: Manager, Finance Operations
tom_walsh.personality: Practical, compliance-focused. Cares about operational impact.

1.subject: Welcome to Basel III Project — BRD Review Needed
1.body_prompt: Write a welcome email from Sarah Chen (VP) to a new Business Analyst joining the Basel III regulatory reporting project. Include: welcome, attach BRD v0.9 for review by EOD, kickoff call at 2PM, come with 3-5 clarifying questions, mention MD David Martinez is watching closely.

1.message_prompt: Write a casual DM from Lisa Park (Tech PM) to the new BA, giving them a heads-up: Section 4.2 of the BRD references Murex feed integration that was discussed for deprioritizing. Worth flagging before Sarah commits to it in scope.

tasks.title: Review BRD v0.9 and add comments
tasks.description: Thoroughly review the Basel III BRD v0.9 document. Add inline comments for any gaps, ambiguities, or concerns. Pay special attention to Section 4.2 (Murex integration).

tasks.title: Prepare kickoff meeting questions
tasks.description: Prepare 3-5 clarifying questions for the 2PM project kickoff meeting. Focus on scope, timeline, and technical dependencies.

tasks.title: Set up project folder structure
tasks.description: Create a logical folder structure in DocVault for all project artifacts: BRDs, meeting notes, test cases, change requests, status reports.

1.message_prompt: Write a channel announcement from Sarah Chen welcoming the new BA to the team and briefly introducing the Basel III project.

1.title: Basel III Project Kickoff
agenda: Student Q&A — clarifying questions from BRD review
1.ai_instructions: Sarah opens the meeting, introduces everyone, provides context. After overview, she turns to the student: 'As our new BA, would you like to share your initial questions after reviewing the BRD?' Evaluate: quality of questions, whether Murex scope issue was raised, active listening. David should ask a challenging question about timeline. Include at least one moment of conflict between Priya's compliance focus and the development timeline.

1.subject: FYI — Regulatory deadline moved
1.body_prompt: Write an email from David Martinez (MD) informing the team that the regulatory deadline has been pulled forward by 3 weeks after discussions with the regulator. No action required today, but the team needs to acknowledge and factor this into planning.

2.subject: Day 2 — Stakeholder alignment needed
2.body_prompt: Email from Sarah asking the student to schedule 1:1s with key stakeholders (Priya and Tom) to gather requirements for their respective areas. Also asks for a status update on BRD review.

2.title: Requirements Gathering — Regulatory Compliance
2.ai_instructions: Priya is detailed and cautious. She reveals several data quality issues that could impact reporting accuracy. Challenge the student with conflicting requirements between speed and accuracy.

2.subject: Scope Change — Murex Deprioritized
2.body_prompt: Email from MD David Martinez: After discussion with Regulatory, Murex feed integration is descoped from Phase 1. Student must: update BRD, notify all affected parties, update task board, draft change control doc by tomorrow morning.

3.subject: Final Day — Deliverables Due
3.body_prompt: Email from Sarah listing final deliverables: updated BRD v1.0, status report for MD, and a brief walkthrough of changes with the team at 3PM.

3.message_prompt: Tom Walsh raises a concern in the project channel about how the Murex descoping affects Finance Operations' ability to reconcile certain reports. He needs clarity on the alternative approach.

3.title: Project Status Walkthrough
3.ai_instructions: This is the final assessment meeting. All stakeholders are present including the MD. Student presents their work. David asks tough questions about timeline implications. Priya challenges on compliance coverage. Evaluate: presentation quality, handling of tough questions, completeness of updates.

curveball_pool.description: Priya and Tom give contradictory requirements about data granularity
Sarah is unexpectedly OOO — student must escalate to David directly
CFO's office requests a one-page summary of the project for board materials
